text: ISO 9001 (Quality Management Systems) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: ALL suppliers, ALL tiers. Note: Non-negotiable baseline. This is an unconditional requirement for its scope. In the current supplier base, 116 of 116 suppliers hold ISO 9001.

ISO 14001 (Environmental Management) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: Tier-1 RM, PM, EC; all Tier-1 with Sustainability Score requirement. Note: Required for Sustainability Score above 85. This requirement is conditional (depends on tier, market, or end-use). In the current supplier base, 22 of 116 suppliers hold ISO 14001.

metadata.mandatory_for: Tier-1 RM, PM, EC; all Tier-1 with Sustainability Score requirement

text: RoHS (Restriction of Hazardous Substances) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: All EC category suppliers. Note: EU directive compliance. This is an unconditional requirement for its scope. In the current supplier base, 14 of 116 suppliers hold RoHS.

REACH (Registration, Evaluation, Authorisation of Chemicals) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: All RM category (EU-market). Note: Mandatory for EU-destined Raw Materials. This requirement is conditional (depends on tier, market, or end-use). In the current supplier base, 11 of 116 suppliers hold REACH.

FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: All PM category suppliers. Note: Paper/fibre packaging only. This is an unconditional requirement for its scope. In the current supplier base, 21 of 116 suppliers hold FSC.

OEKO-TEX (Standard 100 - Textiles) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: All IT category suppliers. Note: Mandatory regardless of tier. This is an unconditional requirement for its scope. In the current supplier base, 15 of 116 suppliers hold OEKO-TEX.

AEC-Q100 (Automotive Electronics Qualification) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: EC suppliers in automotive supply chain. Note: Recommended for Tier-1, mandatory for Tier-2 automotive. This requirement is conditional (depends on tier, market, or end-use). In the current supplier base, 7 of 116 suppliers hold AEC-Q100.

metadata.mandatory_for: EC suppliers in automotive supply chain
metadata.note: Recommended for Tier-1, mandatory for Tier-2 automotive

text: IATF 16949 (Automotive Quality Management System) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: MC suppliers in automotive use. Note: Required for all automotive Mechanical Components. This requirement is conditional (depends on tier, market, or end-use). In the current supplier base, 13 of 116 suppliers hold IATF 16949.

metadata.note: Required for all automotive Mechanical Components

text: AS9100 (Aerospace Quality Management System) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: Tier-1 SA suppliers (aerospace). Note: Pairs with NADCAP. This requirement is conditional (depends on tier, market, or end-use). In the current supplier base, 4 of 116 suppliers hold AS9100.

NADCAP (Aerospace Special Processes) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: SA suppliers - aerospace applications. Note: Mandatory for aerospace. This requirement is conditional (depends on tier, market, or end-use). In the current supplier base, 10 of 116 suppliers hold NADCAP.

OSHA (Occupational Safety and Health (US)) is a certification in the BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8). It is mandatory for: NA-region Tier-1 suppliers. Note: US-specific compliance. This requirement is conditional (depends on tier, market, or end-use). In the current supplier base, 4 of 116 suppliers hold OSHA.

BQBYTE Approved Certification Matrix (Section 8), 11 certifications. ISO 9001: ALL suppliers, ALL tiers | ISO 14001: Tier-1 RM, PM, EC; all Tier-1 with Sustainability Score requirement | RoHS: All EC category suppliers | REACH: All RM category (EU-market) | FSC: All PM category suppliers | OEKO-TEX: All IT category suppliers | AEC-Q100: EC suppliers in automotive supply chain | IATF 16949: MC suppliers in automotive use | AS9100: Tier-1 SA suppliers (aerospace) | NADCAP: SA suppliers - aerospace applications | OSHA: NA-region Tier-1 suppliers. ISO 9001 is the universal non-negotiable baseline for every supplier and tier.
